note: Real-world battlefield maps, baked from GIS data. Regenerate with `python3 tools/maps/ingest.py <name> && python3 tools/maps/bake.py <name>`. The cover grid feeds core::terrain (invariant #1: integer, checksum-stable). Elevation is render-only pending the sim-elevation decision.

maps.name: pointe-du-hoc
maps.title: Pointe du Hoc, Normandy

balance.note: asymmetry near 0 = balanced start positions; large values flag a hand-tune target

maps.elevation: render-only (height.f32); sim has no elevation layer — see docs open question
maps.water_handling: mapped to Cover::Heavy; true impassability pending flow-field decision
maps.license: features: see sources (OSM = ODbL-1.0); baked grid: derived data
